posts.text:
Interested in the future of @tiktok_us? Watch my Exclusive Special report on TikTok's security operation. They say they they're doing more than any other platform to keep China away from your data. Now, you can see it and decide.
 
piped.video/watch?v=gEkn1ZqW…

How to sort through the mess of MISINFORMATION to find the actual FACTS. Check out my @TEDx Talk!!!

piped.video/watch?v=J2jqtfcz…

Thanks Joyce! Nice to hear from you.


Joyce Lupiani (@Joyce_Lupiani)

I worked with @LisaRemillard once upon a time and she is definitely an excellent journalist and great role model for younger journalists. #belikelisa Check out 📺The News Girl 📰's video! #TikTok tiktok.com/t/ZTNwQW9r2/




— https://nitter.net/Joyce_Lupiani/status/1828582231297638842#m

Your federal student loan payments will restart in just two weeks. I know that's stressful for lots of you so I talked with the @usedgov  about everything you need to know. Watch the video below 👇
piped.video/watch?v=sYXrr5XM…

Thanks for crunching the numbers!


USAFacts (@USAFacts)

"Some great information compiled by USAFacts about individual tax burdens based on personal income." @LisaRemillard 

tiktok.com/@lisaremillard/vi… via @tiktok_us 

More info here: usafacts.org/data-projects/s… #taxes




— https://nitter.net/USAFacts/status/1646593561251704832#m

How much are YOU actually paying in taxes? Which states have the highest taxes and which have the lowest taxes? All the interesting data is linked here.
bit.ly/3YV3d5A

#USAFactsPartner

Video

What a special moment during my last show at @KTNV with @HumanNatureLive. Can’t believe that was 10 years ago.


Vegas Past Newscasts (@LVPastCasts)

Prior to her departure on this date a decade ago from @KTNV, @LisaRemillard met up w/Pop Vocal Group @HumanNatureLive in the #KTNV studios, & was treated to choreographed dance moves & acapella performance.  Roll video: #LasVegas #Vegas #Nevada #LV #SouthernNevada #Australia

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/LVPastCasts/status/16309451993

Breaking News. Within the hour the US military shot down ANOTHER “high altitude object” 

piped.video/shorts/VqLr8Irmq…

The Pentagon addresses the what it calls a Chinese surveillance balloon floating at 60,000 feet in US airspace. #chineesespyballoon

piped.video/watch?v=ZH6ja0rg…

Vintage anchor Lisa. 😉


Vegas Past Newscasts (@LVPastCasts)

10 years ago w/@KTNV news w/@TheCaseySmith @LisaRemillard; note - reading print copy due 2 power outage. @MakaylaZurn reports counterfeit NFL merchandise. @BethFisherNV reports. Weather w/Mike Tsolinas. Roll video: #KTNV #LasVegas #Vegas #LV #SouthernNevada #Nevada #HendersonNV

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/LVPastCasts/status/1618500318404423681#m

Thanks Kezhal. I appreciate the kindness ❤️


Kezhal Dashti (@KezhalDashti)

If you're looking for a new way to stay informed, give Lisa's TikTok a follow. 

Or Instagram for those that don't use TikTok.

You can find her at @LisaRemillard. You won't be disappointed.





— https://nitter.net/KezhalDashti/status/1618368934180159489#m

That’s nice of you to say. Thank you for recognizing my work.


Just Like Jesse James 🤠 (@JerseyBoi188)

And thank you for being a voice of FACTS. True journalism.



— https://nitter.net/JerseyBoi188/status/1612470571920510977#m

Surprise announcement! 🤍

Video

🚨SPECIAL REPORT🚨 Trump Week One. 
Go watch my 30 minute DEEP dive special report on the flood of executive orders Trump signed this week. 
I know it’s easy to become overwhelmed because there are so many of them. But this report may help. 
youtu.be/P8N2UAxqJKY?...

In a surprise twist, President-elect Trump filed his own amicus brief to the Supreme Court asking the justices to put a STAY on the TikTok ban so he can decide what to do with it when he takes office. 
www.youtube.com/watch?v=DqdV...

Here is the US Government's opening argument to the Supreme Court.
www.youtube.com/watch?v=uazx...

Here is TikTok's opening argument to the Supreme Court.
www.youtube.com/watch?v=6Nm_...

It has been a DAY. I spent all day reading multiple Supreme Court opening briefs and amicus briefs regarding the TikTok ban and the law that established it.
Standby for a thread with all the information you should know.
Merry Christmas everyone ❤️🎄
Buon Natale sister!!! Glad to see you here too.  🎄❤️

President Biden abandoned his efforts to forgive federal student loans. This comes after several GOP states sued, the courts blocked his plans & the Trump administration says they'll kill the efforts. 

www.youtube.com/watch?v=1TAm...
I appreciate that. Thanks for being here too.

TikTok's lawyers give us a game plan for how they are going to argue in front of the Supreme Court to strike down the TikTok ban on January 19th. More in this video. 
www.youtube.com/watch?v=svx3...

We are on the brink of a government shutdown. How did we get here? This video explains. 
www.youtube.com/watch?v=Oouv...

Senators release scathing report about the BILLIONS of dollars 5 airlines have collected in just seat fees and baggage fees. Then hauled the execs down to Capitol Hill for a smack down. Watch. 

youtu.be/1Jiok1sj8KE?...

Can Trump save TikTok? It’s complicated. But here are some options. 

youtu.be/oH-r5ulLDeU?...

TikTok releases statement saying the ARE APPEALING to ask the Supreme Court to strike down the law that will ban the app on January 19th. 
www.youtube.com/watch?v=eIf-...

TikTok CAN be banned. US Appeals Court ruling just issued. Here's what we know. 

www.youtube.com/shorts/2rDCy...

The numbers are in! And they reveal it's going to be much more difficult for House Republicans to jam through Trump's agenda. This video explains the FACTS and the MATH.
www.youtube.com/watch?v=D__1...
It’s ok if he already filed. This case is still ongoing. So it’s MAYBE possible the requirement will come back. We’ll see what happens

Late tonight a federal judge in Texas issued a nationwide preliminary injunction blocking a controversial new reporting requirement due before Jan. 1 for ALL types of business owners in the US. 
Here's what you need to know about the now blocked BOI requirement.
www.youtube.com/watch?v=tIuZ...

The Supreme Court will hear oral arguments in United States vs Skrmetti TOMORROW. This case specifically asks the question, can states ban gender affirming care for minors? 
All you need to know about the case is here. 👇
www.youtube.com/watch?v=eFPZ...

#presidenttrump #trumpcoin #america250 A government panel just approved a $1 commemorative coin for the 250th birthday of the United States. This coin features President Trump. But can the US mint legally produce this coin?
#iranwar #presidenttrump President Trump expecting to ask Congress for at least $200 BILLION MORE to continue this war with Iran. This video explains what we know.

#epsteinfiles #pambondi Attorney General Pam Bondi’s “briefing” for House members on the Epstein files quickly goes off the rails. They say Bondi  won’t commit to testifying under oath as required by her subpoena

#markwaynemullin #randpaul #homelandsecurity Sen. Markwayne Mullin’s confirmation hearing got heated when there was a throw down between Mullin and committee chairman Sen. Rand Paul (KY). So will he be the next DHs secretary? Here’s what we know

#interestrates #inflation #iranwar Federal Reserve keep interest rates steady amidst spinkjng gas prices and economic uncertainty from this war with Iran. Plus the Fed is forecasting higher inflation in 2026 than originally thought. This video explains why
#interestrates #federalreserve #inflation The Fed just decided to leave interest rates unchanged despite rising oil prices and market turmoil because of the war with Iran.

#traveltok #ice #tsa TSA lines are getting longer and longer at airports around the country and hundreds of TSA agents have quit because they have now gone more than a month without pay. And that’s because Congress has not funded homeland security. The White House presented its latest offer and Democrats threw it out. This video explains what it’s going to take to end this funding standoff

#pambondi #epsteinfiles #epstein It’s official Attorney General Pam Bondi was served with a subpoena from the House Oversight Committee to testify about her handling of the Epstein files and Epstein investigation. But will she show up? This video explains.

#presidenttrump #nato #straitofhormuz President Trump asked for help with reopening the Strait of Hormuz from the NATO allies. Abruptly today, Trump said we don’t need help from anyone. So what happened? Turns out the NATO allies turned down his request. Here’s why.

#saveamericaact #votingrights #presidenttrump This is a big week for the Save America Act. This video explains what we can expect and why this could drag out for at least a week. Plus this video explains the math.
